---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for UnitAutogen
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. (e.g. "I can't tell which branches of my procedure are covered when I have a recursive CTE inside an IF branch.")

## Proposed solution

What you'd like UnitAutogen to do.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried other approaches or tools? What didn't work?

## Use case / context

- How often would you use this?
- How critical is it for your team?
- Is it blocking adoption, or a nice-to-have?

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — links, screenshots, related issues, etc.
